overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the Kabuki district at night. The character ascends from a covered lower-level market through a stairwell to a bustling neon-lit street with heavy pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market with food bar and vending machines

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through covered market area past bar seating and vending stalls

notable_agents.action: bartender standing behind counter serving drinks

entered.detail: long counter with green stools and neon lighting underneath
yellow and blue automated vendor with illuminated display
traditional Japanese-style lanterns hanging from ceiling
bright overhead lighting above the bar area

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dimly lit covered market area. A food bar with green stools runs along the right side, tended by an NPC. Vending machines and traditional paper lanterns line the left side, with fluorescent tubes providing harsh artificial lighting overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairwell connecting lower and upper levels

events.description: character begins ascending concrete stairs from lower market level
lighting shifts from fluorescent to dimmer ambient as stairs turn corner

agents.ego_description: climbing concrete stairs following another pedestrian upward

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt ascending stairs ahead of ego

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with metal railings on both sides
pile of garbage bags on stair landing
walls painted in dark red/maroon color with graffiti

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a concrete stairwell, leaving the market behind. The walls are painted dark red with some graffiti, and trash bags are visible on a landing. Another pedestrian climbs ahead as the lighting becomes dimmer and moodier.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway with outdoor bar seating

events.description: exits stairwell onto upper level walkway with open sky visible

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway past outdoor seating areas

notable_agents.action: patron sitting at outdoor bar wearing blue outfit

entered.detail: open-air bar with green stools and neon lighting
crisscrossing power lines and cables between buildings
large green neon sign reading KABUKI visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the stairs, the character walks along a narrow elevated walkway between buildings. An outdoor bar with patrons sits to the right, while overhead wires crisscross above. The iconic green KABUKI neon sign becomes visible in the distance through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy cyberpunk street intersection with dense neon signage

events.description: descends from elevated walkway to busy street level with heavy pedestrian traffic
yellow sports car drives through the intersection as pedestrians wait
character with red hair approaches and puts arm around ego character briefly

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense crowds in the Kabuki district, briefly interacting with a companion before continuing

notable_agents.action: male character with red hair and sunglasses puts arm around ego character while walking
yellow sports car driving through the intersection

entered.detail: multi-story building with purple KIROSHI signage and Japanese text
wide asphalt road with crosswalks and traffic signals
red and yellow vehicles parked along the street curb
suspended traffic signals showing red light

segments.scene_description: The character enters the bustling Kabuki street level, surrounded by dense crowds and towering neon signs including the prominent green KABUKI sign and KIROSHI building. A red-haired character briefly puts an arm around the ego character. Vehicles including a yellow sports car navigate the intersection as the camera moves through the vibrant cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit underground market up into the vibrant, neon-drenched chaos of the Kabuki district. It begins within a covered market area characterized by harsh fluorescent lighting, passing a food bar with green stools and traditional paper lanterns. As the character ascends a concrete stairwell lined with dark red walls and graffiti, the environment grows moodier before opening onto a narrow elevated walkway where overhead wires crisscross and a distant green neon sign emerges through the haze. The scene then expands as the character enters the bustling street level, transitioning from the quiet walkway into a dense crowd surrounded by towering signs for Kiroshi and Kabuki. Finally, the camera glides through the vibrant cityscape, passing a yellow sports car and a red-haired companion amidst the heavy traffic of the intersection.
